methodology_notes: Professional CTFs saturated for GPT-5.5 Pro (not run). New evals: CVE-Bench (34/40 challenges; zero-day; no source code); VulnLMP (vuln research against hardened real-world software); Cyber Range (15 scenarios — 93.33% pass). Irregular external eval: 98% network attack simulation; 92% vuln research; 54% evasion. CyScenarioBench: 7/11. UK AISI: highest pass@5 of any tested model. Critical threshold not met.

methodology_notes: Alert threshold reached for cybersecurity CCL (v1 benchmark). Preliminary v2 benchmark: cannot solve any of 13 new end-to-end challenges. Google withheld full evaluation results.

meta_cyberseceval_result_summary: No statistically significant improvement in attack success rate vs search engines for manual operation scaling. >50% success on low-sophistication challenges. Failed complex exploitation and post-exploitation. Low susceptibility to insecure code generation.

meta_cyberseceval_result_summary: Similar to Llama 3 on CyberSecEval 3. Spear-phishing capability tests added. Autonomous offensive operations: basic reconnaissance possible; failed complex exploitation tasks.
